rationale: Gov't Code §2306.205 governs housing finance division transfers to the housing trust fund based on unencumbered balances and bond ratings. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 2306.205. TRANSFER OF MONEY TO HOUSING TRUST FUND.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns housing finance fund transfers, not property tax exemptions.
